hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.rs"'; then cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'migrations/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Migration files are immutable. Create a new timestamped migration instead."}'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'packages/api-client/src/schema.d.ts'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "schema.d.ts is generated output. Modify src/api/**/*.rs utoipa annotations, then run `just typegen` to regenerate."}'; fi
